{{ }} {{ text := "new banner is needed" }} {{ $string := "correct var name" }} {{ $string }} {{ $string := "can't do this" }} {{ define "earth" }} original yolo {{ end }} {{ template "earth" }} {{ define "earth" }} fake yolo {{ end }} {{ "Gianis" | printf "hello %s" }} {{ and ( $namer := 2 ) 23 $namer | not }} {{ if and (eq 23 3.0) (len .slice) }} {{ define "new_tower" }} // should show an error {{ end }} {{ template "new_tower" }} {{ end }} {{ define "nono" }} // to remove {{ define "new_tower" }} {{ end }} {{ template "new_tower" }} {{ end }} {{ range }} {{ end }} {{ (getPerson "penny").Name }} if/else if/else range/else with/else {{range $k, $v := .}} {{$k}}: {{printf "%#v" $v}} {{end}} {{if (gt (len (printf "%v" .Anything)) 10)}}BIG{{end}} {{ index (index .Deep "nested") "value" }} {{ index 10 2 }} {{ "hello world" | printf "%s!!!" | printf "%q" | html }} Hello, {{ .Name }}! {{ and ($namer := "steveenson") 23 $namer }} {{ $namer }} ----{{ or nil 3455 }} {{- if 1 | eq nil }} Hello {{- end }} +++++ {{ define "base_" }} {{ block "content" . }} // this okay apparently Default content {{ end }} {{ block "hello" .}} hello {{ end }} {{ end }} {{ template "base_"}}
